raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 2274 will create a Back-to-School Tax Holiday for school supplies in California.",
    "AB 2274 aims to combat the high cost of living for young citizens and low-income families in California.",
    "Assembly Bill 2626 will extend the deadline for local governments to transition their specialized fleet vehicles to zero-emission vehicles by ten years.",
    "The extension provided by Assembly Bill 2626 intends to support small cities facing challenges in transitioning to new technologies.",
    "Assembly Bill 2912 requires the California Energy Commission to provide monthly online updates about gasoline prices and the effectiveness of SB X1-2.",
    "The reports mandated by Assembly Bill 2912 will include information on the differences between national average and California gasoline prices.",
    "Assembly Bill 3153 implements a 15-year extension for the Balboa Island Ferry to modify its electric motor.",
    "It is anticipated to cost millions of dollars to electrify the fleet of the Balboa Island Ferry."
  ]
}
```
